prompt: list.remove(1) removes the wrong thing. What is the bug?
choices: ArrayList.remove() always removes by value for Integer lists
list.remove(int) removes by index; list.remove(1) removes the element at index 1 (value 20), not the element with value 1
Integer.valueOf(1) and 1 are identical arguments for List.remove()
ArrayList does not support remove() on Integer lists
explanation: List<E>.remove(int index) and List<E>.remove(Object o) are two overloads. Passing the literal 1 selects remove(int), removing index 1 (value 20). To remove by value, use list.remove(Integer.valueOf(1)), which selects the Object overload.
